title: Overview of TNEA Counselling 2026

detail.title: Overview of TNEA Counselling 2026
detail.short_info: TNEA Counselling 2026 registration is open from May 3 to June 2, 2026. Check how to apply for TN Engineering Counselling, important dates, eligibility, fee and step-by-step process at tneaonline.org.

content.text: TNEA Counselling 2026 (Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions) registration is now open. The Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE), Tamil Nadu has started the online registration process for admission to B.E./B.Tech courses in government and private engineering colleges for the academic year 2026-27. Registration started on May 3, 2026, and the last date to apply is June 2, 2026. This is a complete step-by-step guide on how to apply, important dates, eligibility, fee, and counselling process.

rows: Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE), Tamil Nadu

content.text: Apply Online / Registration: TNEA Official Portal

items: Must have passed HSC (Class 12) or equivalent with Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics.
Should satisfy Tamil Nadu nativity / domicile requirements.
Candidates appearing for Class 12 in 2026 can also apply.

sections.heading: How to Apply for TNEA Counselling 2026 (Step-by-Step)

items: Complete User Registration with valid email and mobile number.
Fill the online application form with personal, academic and contact details.
Upload scanned copies of required certificates.
Preview, submit the application and download the PDF for future reference.
